title: The Folder Nobody Can Open
ticket: The team folder says Access Denied. Fix it without over-permissioning.
clue: Least privilege is safer than full control.
tooltip: Check Security permissions before changing ownership.
whyItMatters: Correct access keeps work moving and data safe.
careerConnection: Permissions troubleshooting is core endpoint support work.

actionTask.instructions: Grant the right user read access and retest the folder.
actionTask.expectedResult: The right user can open the folder with limited access.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Security tab showing the correct group entry.

repeatTask: Repeat on a second test folder.
breakFixTask: Apply a deny entry by mistake, then remove it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Folder access is restored with safe permissions.

translationTerms.plain: A rule for what users can do.
